DB.description: D1 database for accounts, tasks, activity logs, scan history, and system config.

KV.description: KV namespace reserved for lightweight Worker-side state and future session/config extensions.

CPA_BASE_URL.description: Optional default CPA management base URL. Used as a fallback when the admin panel has not saved `base_url` yet.

CPA_TOKEN.description: Optional default CPA management token. Used as a fallback when the admin panel has not saved `token` yet.

ADMIN_USERNAME.description: Optional initial admin username. Defaults to `admin` when `ADMIN_PASSWORD` or `ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH` is provided.

ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Recommended for first deploy. Set a strong initial admin password; it will be hashed on first initialization.

ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH.description: Optional pre-hashed admin password if you do not want to provide plain text `ADMIN_PASSWORD`.

JWT_SECRET.description: Set a long random secret for signing login tokens, for example via `openssl rand -hex 32`.
